title: Cuneiform Tablet #0040: Hellenistic Administrative
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a administrative document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Hellenistic period — a administrative document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Hellenistic period. Administrative document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records administrative matters typical of Hellenistic period administrative or literary practice.
